Web3 crypto coins are blockchain-based digital assets that enable decentralized internet services.
They power Web3 ecosystems by allowing users to own their data, interact without intermediaries, participate in governance, earn rewards through decentralized finance, and access various platforms such as decentralized applications (dApps), blockchain networks, digital identities, DeFi platforms, NFTs, and metaverse ecosystems.
